I need: (1) immediate confirmation of what data was accessed (specific fields/tables), (2) whether any of the exported data included PII that triggers GDPR/CCPA notification requirements, (3) whether other accounts in our organization were also compromised (we have 25 users), (4) forensic logs showing how the API key was obtained (was it a leak on our end or a vulnerability on yours?), and (5) a formal incident report we can provide to our DPO and potentially the ICO within the 72-hour GDPR notification window, which started ticking this morning.
